name: Brainvolution: Master of Memory
overview: “Brainvolution: Master of Memory” is Korea’s first-ever quiz-based variety show that aims to awaken the dormant “memory power” of modern individuals. Moving beyond simple memorization, the program tests reasoning, reflexes, and creative thinking, framing contemporary issues such as reliance on smartphones and digital devices, the subconscious “externalization” of memory, and so-called “digital dementia” through an innovative entertainment format.
